description: Detailed menu items with corresponding prices in Saudi Riyals, often accompanied by location details and dish descriptions for F&B establishments.
structural_recipe: 1) Display restaurant/venue name and location (address or landmark). 2) List menu items in Arabic with clear pricing in SAR. 3) Format as itemized list with price per dish. 4) Include dish descriptions or preparation notes. 5) Add restaurant contact/booking information. 6) Tag or mention restaurant accounts for credibility.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers value transparency in pricing before visiting establishments. Price listings reduce purchase friction by eliminating surprise costs and build trust through clear, organized information. This directly influences dining decisions in a price-conscious market.
transplantation_caveats: Prices must be current and verified to maintain credibility; outdated pricing damages trust
Must use Arabic numerals and SAR currency symbol for local market relevance
Requires restaurant permission or collaboration to avoid disputes over pricing accuracy
Seasonal menu changes and promotions need regular updates
cultural_constraints: Timing sensitivity during Ramadan when menus and prices change significantly
Friday dining preferences influence which venues to feature
Gender-segregated or family-friendly venue designations may be relevant
